content:
✔ Why Public Rituals Work:
✔ Encourages social dynamics & player engagement.
✔ Adds layers of tension—players may sabotage or support a ritual.
✔ Prevents secret manipulation, ensuring the class stays invested in major events.

📌 FINAL LOCK-IN QUESTIONS BEFORE EXECUTING VERSION 8.9

1. Should Fate Counters Be Limited to Three Per Semester, or Unlimited?

✔ Ex: Should the class only have three total chances to counter fate changes, or should it always be possible?

2. Should Archetype Purges Come with an XP Loss or Another Penalty?

✔ Ex: Should purging an archetype always result in losing XP, items, or another penalty?

3. Should Rituals Have Physical Components (ex: Writing, Symbol Drawing, etc.)?

✔ Ex: Should students be required to physically interact with an object (paper, dice, drawing a sigil) to make the ritual feel more immersive?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 530 (chunk 530/555)
